name: Raistlin
ac_notes: 10 + 4 (DEX) + 1 (Staff of Defense) + 1 (Ring of Protection) + 2 (Bracers of Defense) = 18. With Mage Armor: 21. Shield reaction: 26.

class_features.name: Arcane Recovery
class_features.description: Once per day during a short rest, recover spell slots with combined level equal to half wizard level (rounded up). At level 3, recover up to one 2nd-level slot or one 1st-level slot.

class_features.name: Divination Savant
class_features.description: The gold and time to copy a divination spell into your spellbook is halved.

class_features.name: Portent
class_features.description: After a long rest, roll 2d20 and record the numbers. You can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check made by you or a creature you can see with one of these rolls. Must declare before the roll. Each portent roll can be used only once.

class_features.name: War Caster
class_features.description: Feat (Level 4 ASI). Advantage on CON saving throws to maintain concentration when taking damage. Can perform somatic components even with weapons/shield in hands. Can cast a spell as an opportunity attack reaction.

racial_features.name: Darkvision
racial_features.description: Can see in dim light within 60 feet as if bright light, and in darkness as if dim light.

racial_features.name: Fey Ancestry
racial_features.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

racial_features.name: Trance
racial_features.description: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply for 4 hours a day.

racial_features.name: Cantrip
racial_features.description: One free wizard cantrip: Minor Illusion.

spellcasting.cantrip_swap_note: Prestidigitation swapped for Chill Touch at Level 4 — prevents healing on targets, stops boss/undead regeneration

spellbook_notes.tome_source: Tome of the Drow Archlich — Wave Echo Cave. All 6 copied (750gp total). Tome sold for 5000gp.

inventory.name: Staff of Defense
inventory.description: While holding, +1 AC. 10 charges, regains 1d6+4 at dawn. Spend charges to cast: Mage Armor (1 charge) or Shield (2 charges). Crumbles if all charges spent.

inventory.name: Scroll of Counterspell
inventory.description: Reaction: counter a spell being cast within 60ft. Spells 3rd level or lower auto-cancelled. 4th level+: Arcana check DC 10 + spell level. If Raistlin's slot level exceeds spell level he knows, DC 13 Arcana or scroll fails.
inventory.source: Forge of Spells — crafted by Raistlin (3 scrolls x 250gp = 750gp)
inventory.note: Temporary until Level 5 when Raistlin can prepare Counterspell directly

inventory.name: Wand of the Burning Phoenix
inventory.attunement_note: Requires attunement by spellcaster. All 3 slots currently full — swap Ring of Protection if desired.
inventory.spell: Fireball (enhanced — 4d8 fire, DC 15 DEX save, 20ft radius)
inventory.special: Hit terrain ignites — becomes difficult terrain (fire)

inventory.name: Pearl (spell component)
inventory.description: 100gp pearl — material component for Identify spell. Consumed on cast.

inventory.name: Scroll of Augury
inventory.description: Cast Augury once. Receive weal/woe omen for a course of action within 30 minutes. No concentration.

inventory.name: Scroll of Blindness/Deafness
inventory.description: Target creature CON save or blinded/deafened for 1 minute. Repeats save each turn.

inventory.name: Ring (silver, runes) — UNIDENTIFIED
inventory.description: Silver ring with arcane runes. From Drow mage at Cragmaw Castle. Likely magical. Raistlin to cast Identify.

inventory.name: Ring of Protection
inventory.description: +1 bonus to AC and all saving throws while wearing this ring.
inventory.source: Old Owl Well — extorted from Kost

inventory.name: Bracers of Defense
inventory.description: +2 bonus to AC while not wearing armor or using a shield. No attunement required.
inventory.source: Forge of Spells — Wave Echo Cave (750gp, Raistlin halved cost)

traits: I was, in fact, raised by books. People confuse me
I'm willing to listen to every side of an argument before I make my own judgment
personality.ideal: No Limits — Nothing should fetter the infinite possibility inherent in all existence
personality.bond: I sold my soul for knowledge. I hope to do great deeds and win it back
personality.flaw: Most people scream and run when they see a demon. I stop and take notes on its anatomy
personality.appearance: A gaunt High Elf with obsidian-dark skin and sharp cheekbones that catch shadows like they were carved for it. His pale amber eyes are always half-narrowed, studying everything like it's a page he hasn't finished reading. Long white hair is pulled back and tied with a leather cord stained with ink. His robes hang loose on a thin frame — he forgets to eat when he's researching, which is always. His fingers are perpetually ink-stained, and he carries his spellbook the way a soldier carries a sword — never out of arm's reach. Between the albino Centaur and the dark-skinned Elf, the party turns heads in every tavern. When others speak, he listens with unsettling patience, weighing every word. When he speaks, it's deliberate and quiet — the kind of voice that makes people lean in, which is exactly what he wants.
personality.backstory: Raistlin was born into a minor High Elf noble house but spent his childhood in the libraries, not the courts. His dark complexion marked him as unusual among his kin — whispered about but never explained. He didn't care. Books were better company than elves who judged by appearance. He devoured every tome in the family archive by his twentieth year, then moved to a cloistered scriptorium where he studied for decades. It wasn't enough. When he hit the limits of sanctioned knowledge, he found other sources — older, darker, with a price. He traded something he can't quite name for access to texts that shouldn't exist. Now he travels to do enough good to earn back what he lost, taking notes on every horror he encounters along the way. He doesn't run from demons. He indexes them.

combat_role_reference.note: Reference guide — not prescriptive. Use situationally.

portent_priority.high_roll: Replace enemy saving throw vs Hold Person or Web — guarantee the spell lands
portent_priority.low_roll: Replace enemy attack roll — turn a hit into a miss on Raistlin or an ally

key_synergies: Portent + Hold Person = guaranteed paralyze on any humanoid
Faerie Fire + Bron/Dain = whole-party advantage on affected targets
Web + War Caster = concentration stays up even when Raistlin is hit
Archimedes Help action = advantage on Raistlin spell attacks

ac_sequence.staff_charges_per_day: 1 for Mage Armor (morning) + up to 4 Shield reactions

level_history.notes: Divination chosen for Portent synergy with party tactics. Identify (ritual, free item ID) and Absorb Elements (survival vs elemental damage).
Web for battlefield control, Shatter for AoE damage. Misty Step copied from Iarno's spellbook (100gp) for emergency escape vs dragon.
War Caster for concentration advantage — critical for maintaining Web/Mage Armor in combat. 4 new spells from Iarno and Drow spellbooks. Both spellbooks sold after copying (net cost 150gp).
